---
name: New prompt / workflow proposal
about: Propose a new pipeline stage, industry example, or tool workflow
title: "[PROPOSAL] "
labels: proposal
assignees: ''
---

**What are you proposing?**
(e.g. a new stage prompt, a new industry example, a new tool workflow)

**Where does it fit in the pipeline?**
Reference `docs/workflow.md` — does this slot into the existing sequence, or is it a new branch?

**Why is this a separate addition rather than an extension of an existing file?**

**Draft outline**
If proposing a new prompt, sketch its Purpose / Inputs / Outputs per the structure in `docs/prompt-guide.md`.

**Are you planning to submit this yourself, or suggesting it for someone else to build?**
